calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Jaynes for and with Mary Doran (Executor)

Ms. Doran apologized for not knowing the procedures when she placed the funds in her personal account, and stated that the funds have not been distributed. Ms. Jaynes stated that Ms. Doran was working with an attorney friend in Missouri who helped collect assets from California and Missouri, is trying to file back tax returns for 1987-2016, and 2017's taxes have been filed. The Petition for Final Distribution is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
